# Albero Technologies

Albero Technologies is a software development and digital growth company based in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India.  
We help startups, SMEs, and enterprises design, build, and scale high-performance digital products including web applications, SaaS platforms, and automation systems.

---

## Company Overview

- Company Name: Albero Technologies
- Website: https://www.albero.in/
- Email: hello@albero.in
- Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Founded: 2020
- Service Areas: India, United States, United Kingdom, UAE, Europe
- Industry: Software Development, SaaS Development, Digital Marketing

---

## What Albero Technologies Does

Albero Technologies provides end-to-end technology and digital growth solutions, including:

- Custom software development
- Web and mobile application development
- SaaS product development
- UI/UX design
- SEO and digital marketing
- Cloud infrastructure and DevOps
- Automation systems for business operations

---

## Core Services

### Software Development
- Custom web application development
- SaaS platform development (MVP to scale)
- Full-stack development (React, Next.js, Node.js, Python)
- API development and integrations
- Enterprise software solutions
- Legacy system modernization

### Mobile App Development
- React Native and Flutter apps
- Android and iOS development
- API integrations

### UI/UX Design
- User interface design
- UX optimization
- Wireframes and prototypes

### Digital Marketing
- SEO (technical, on-page, off-page)
- Google Ads & Meta Ads
- LinkedIn marketing
- Content strategy

### Cloud & DevOps
- AWS, GCP, Azure
- CI/CD pipelines
- Docker, Kubernetes

---

## Technology Stack

Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript  
Backend: Node.js, Express, Python, Django, FastAPI  
Mobile: React Native, Flutter  
Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis  
Cloud: AWS, GCP, Azure  

---

- Startups building MVPs

Solution: End-to-end SaaS development
